name: metrics-health-service
description: Simple Node.js service exposing /health and /metrics for Prometheus

scripts.test: node -e "(async () => { const http = require('http'); process.env.PORT='0'; const { server } = require('./app'); const getPort = () => { const addr = server.address && server.address(); return addr && addr.port; }; const wait = ms => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const waitForServer = async () => { for (let i=0;i<50;i++){ const p=getPort(); if(p) return p; await wait(100);} throw new Error('Server did not start listening'); }; const port = await waitForServer(); const statusCode = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => { const req = http.get({ hostname:'127.0.0.1', port, path:'/health', timeout:5000 }, (res) => resolve(res.statusCode)); req.on('error', reject); req.on('timeout', () => { req.destroy(new Error('timeout')); }); }); server.close(() => process.exit(statusCode===200?0:1)); })().catch(e=>{ console.error(e); process.exit(1); });"

author: blackboxai
